etymology.description: Depicts a kneeling figure turning around with mouth open
etymology.interpretation: The character 旡(jì, "inhale") visually represents a person kneeling with their mouth open as if inhaling or turning. This pictorial form is related to the idea of consuming or taking in something, which aligns with its meaning. The ancient version of this character is 㒫, showing a more explicit resemblance to its intended depiction.
